meta.notes: This JSON is the source-of-truth blueprint. Every visible element, its data source, styling and behavior is documented here so Grace/Linus (and the renderer) can rebuild the page deterministically.

typography._note: These sizes DRIVE the live page — apply_product_design injects them as CSS vars (--tobp-*) consumed by the section. Change a value here + re-apply to resize the real page.
typography.font_rule: TEMPLATE RULE: minimum 1.8rem on the whole product page. EXCEPTIONS: buttons (option buttons + add-to-cart) = 1.5rem (option_button_size); description_size = 1.5rem. Logo = 2rem.

size_chart.title: Size guide
size_chart.subtitle: Baby & toddler sizing by height and weight
size_chart.source: SHILAV baby size standard (generic baby clothing sizing)
size_chart.behavior: the 'Size chart' link opens this as a centered popup modal; built from this JSON by apply_product_design

responsive.behavior: stack to single column, thumbnails become a horizontal scroll row under the main image

mobile_overrides._note: Fixes mobile product page: on phones the 4/5 portrait hero filled the whole viewport and the 3rem title / 2.6rem price were oversized, pushing the title+price+Add-to-cart below the fold and under the browser's floating bottom bar. These literal values intentionally override the --tobp-* CSS vars inside the @media(max-width:820px) block.
mobile_overrides.page_padding: 16px 16px 48px (extra bottom padding clears the mobile browser bar)

main_image._why: keep image from eating the whole screen so info is near the fold

size_buttons.render: flex 1 1 22% — buttons share the row evenly instead of min-width 74px overflowing

sections.behavior: clicking a thumbnail swaps the main image (data-full attribute); active thumb highlighted
sections.improvement_todo: most products have only 1 image — source 3-5 real images per product from CJ

current.style: 2.1rem bold, updates live on size change via JS

options.name: Size
options.unavailable: greyed + disabled when that variant is not available
options.hide_when: option is the default single 'Title' option (no real variants)

options.name: Color
options.status: not yet sourced from CJ for most products

sections.label: Add to cart
sections.behavior: Shopify product form posts the SELECTED variant id (#tobp-vid, updated by the size buttons) to /cart/add
sections.style: full-width, dark bg, white, uppercase, 19px padding, weight 700

rules: use the REAL CJ product content (materials, features) — never the generic template

behaviors.variant_selection: JS reads product.variants JSON, matches the selected option values, updates #tobp-vid + price + availability
behaviors.gallery_swap: JS swaps main image src from the clicked thumbnail's data-full

css.lives_in: the <style> block inside the section liquid

open_issues: Color option not sourced from CJ yet
Most products have only 1 image — need 3-5 real images each
Breadcrumbs not yet added (TerminalX has them)
Optional: animated brand marquee on product page for consistency with homepage
